examples: I have suggested that it is not just a relapse into infantilism, but a genuine attempt to get at something necessary.
This problem of spiritual and moral lag, which constitutes modern man's chief dilemma, expresses itself in three larger problems which grow out of man's ethical infantilism.
For many, it looks as if the infantilism of Hollywood has washed up on Broadway.
Another chapter in the endless saga of American male infantilism.
